creator: siegel@barebones.com
text:
I wasn't able to reproduce the symptom using FreeBSD 13.1 (aarch64) in a virtual machine, so either it's a bug from an older version that's been fixed and Apple is using an obsolete fork, or it's a bug that Apple has introduced in their fork.

(Apologies for not checking this sooner; at the time I wrote the initial report I didn't have access to a recent FreeBSD install and naively assumed that Apple's diff was based on shipping FreeBSD.)
